features.problem: Slow performance and lag during trading, especially during peak hours.
features.why_it_matters: If not addressed, users will experience delays and inaccuracies in their trading activities, leading to frustration and potential loss of business.
features.solution: Implement real-time data streaming to ensure immediate updates and reduce lag during high-traffic periods. Optimize server load balancing to handle increased traffic efficiently.
user_flow: User opens the trading dashboard.
The app streams real-time data, updating prices and charts instantly.
User performs trades without experiencing lag or delays.
User receives real-time notifications for important market events.
features.expected_impact: Reduces trading lag by 70%, improving user satisfaction and trust.

features.problem: Payment and withdrawal processes are unreliable and cause frustration.
features.why_it_matters: Unreliable payment and withdrawal processes can lead to user churn and negative reviews, damaging the brand's reputation.
features.solution: Revamp the payment and withdrawal system to ensure reliability and speed. Implement a more robust customer support system to address issues promptly.
user_flow: User initiates a payment or withdrawal request.
The app processes the request quickly and provides real-time status updates.
User receives confirmation of the transaction within minutes.
User can track the status of their transactions through the app.
features.expected_impact: Reduces payment and withdrawal issues by 80%, improving user retention.

features.problem: Customer support is unresponsive and difficult to reach.
features.why_it_matters: Unresponsive customer support leads to user frustration and can result in negative reviews and lost customers.
features.solution: Implement a more responsive customer support system with live chat, faster ticket resolution, and a dedicated support team.
user_flow: User navigates to the help and support section.
User selects the 'Raise a Ticket' option or starts a live chat session.
Support team responds to the user within minutes.
User receives a resolution to their issue and can track the progress of their ticket.
features.expected_impact: Improves customer support response time by 60%, reducing user frustration.

features.problem: Trading charts and technical analysis tools are problematic and unreliable.
features.why_it_matters: Unreliable trading charts and tools can lead to incorrect trading decisions and financial losses for users.
features.solution: Improve the reliability and accuracy of trading charts and technical analysis tools. Ensure real-time updates and add advanced charting features.
user_flow: User opens the trading chart for a specific asset.
The app displays the chart with real-time data and advanced technical indicators.
User applies various technical analysis tools to the chart.
User makes informed trading decisions based on the accurate and reliable data.
features.expected_impact: Reduces chart and tool issues by 75%, improving user confidence in trading decisions.

features.problem: Noise in revenue strings (e.g., '$', '+') causes normalization issues in data processing.
features.why_it_matters: Normalization issues can lead to inaccurate financial analysis and user confusion, eroding trust in the platform.
features.solution: Develop and implement a robust data cleaning and normalization script to remove noise from revenue strings and ensure data integrity.
user_flow: User views financial data in the app.
The app automatically cleans and normalizes the data, removing noise and inconsistencies.
User sees accurate and consistent financial figures.
User can perform reliable financial analysis using the cleaned data.
features.expected_impact: Reduces data normalization issues by 90%, improving data accuracy and user trust.

features.problem: Compliance issues with specific labels (e.g., 'Hidden Plateau') that could be construed as investment advice.
features.why_it_matters: Non-compliant labeling can lead to legal and reputational damage, and erode user trust.
features.solution: Develop a comprehensive compliance review system to regularly check and update all labels and content to ensure they comply with regulations.
user_flow: User views company profiles and financial data.
The app ensures all labels and content are compliant and do not imply investment advice.
User receives accurate and legally compliant information.
User can make informed decisions without legal concerns.
features.expected_impact: Reduces compliance issues by 85%, minimizing legal risks and enhancing user trust.
